property_issue_summary: The inspection identifies 7 impacted areas across the property.
The most consistent issue patterns are moisture ingress, dampness, or leakage, wet-area tile or plumbing defects, secondary spread into ceilings or adjacent areas.
The thermal report contains 30 observations, with 30 left unmatched where confidence was weak.

area_wise_observations.observation_summary: Hall Skirting level Dampness Common Bathroom tile hollowness
area_wise_observations.probable_root_cause: Moisture ingress likely linked to wet-area tile joint failure, plumbing leakage, or poor sealing.
area_wise_observations.severity_reasoning: Severity is based on visible moisture-related distress is present.
recommended_actions: Inspect bathroom and plumbing fixtures, then repair leaking joints, traps, or concealed lines.
Re-grout or reseal failed tile joints and replace hollow or loose tiles where needed.
Trace the moisture source before cosmetic repairs, then remove damaged plaster and repaint after drying.
additional_notes: This section was generated without LLM support.
